title: Anvil Tools
description: Rename tool to change its appearance
body:
<center>

![Pickaxe Logo Animation](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/83030839838341509f829c08fa66d6b62ccdff92.gif)

</center>
<hr>
<center>
  
  **The resourse pack works for versions 1.21.5 and newer.**

  **The resource pack works on vanilla and DOES NOT require any mods.**
  
  **The resourse pack adds the ability to change the appearance of items via renaming them in the anvil.**

**All supported items and namebles you can find on [Google Docs](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1RaYio0glzCv--7xW00d-5KkRNJnNoCPgv7dtk0mEark/edit?usp=sharing).**

**Some items have animations and emissive textures.** 

**To get emissive textures you need [CIT Resewn mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn) or [OptiFine](https://optifine.net/downloads).**

**Supported languages: English & Ukrainian.** 

</center>
<hr>
<center>

![Appearances Changes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1b2cea737e8d8cd3fc6dfd70727f4795371b204e.gif)

</center>

![Anvil Tools Showcase](https://i.imgur.com/z44hB1b.png)

<center>
  
[CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/anvil-tools) | [Planet Minecraft](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/anvil-tools/) | [Linktree](https://linktr.ee/kaufmo) | [Discord](https://discord.gg/pA2XVMzGue)

</center>

<details>
<summary>Names to use:</summary>

Now you can find all the names with examples of textures in the [Google Docs](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1RaYio0glzCv--7xW00d-5KkRNJnNoCPgv7dtk0mEark/edit?usp=sharing). 

</details>
<details>
<summary>Names to use (UA):</summary>

Тепер всі назви з прикладами текстур Ви можете знайти в [Гугл Документі](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1RaYio0glzCv--7xW00d-5KkRNJnNoCPgv7dtk0mEark/edit?usp=sharing).

</details>
